name: sveltia-cms
author: secondsky
description: Sveltia CMS Git-backed content management (Decap/Netlify CMS successor). 5x smaller bundle (300 KB), GraphQL performance, solves 260+ issues. Use for static sites (Hugo, Jekyll, 11ty, Gatsby, Astro, Next.js), blogs, docs, i18n, or encountering OAuth errors, TOML/YAML issues, CORS problems, content listing errors.
description_zh: Sveltia CMS 是一个轻量级、基于 Git 的无头内容管理系统，是 Decap/Netlify CMS 的现代继任者。它提供 5 倍更小的包体积、卓越的性能，并解决了 260 多个问题，非常适合管理 Hugo、Astro 和 Next.js 等框架构建的静态站点内容。
_original_description: Sveltia CMS is a lightweight, Git-backed headless CMS that serves as a modern successor to Decap/Netlify CMS. It offers a 5x smaller bundle, superior performance, and solves over 260 issues, making it ideal for managing content on static sites built with frameworks like Hugo, Astro, and Next.js.

name: swift-best-practices
author: secondsky
description:
This skill should be used when writing or reviewing Swift code for iOS or macOS projects. Apply modern Swift 6+ best practices, concurrency patterns, API design guidelines, and migration strategies. Covers async/await, actors, MainActor, Sendable, typed throws, and Swift 6 breaking changes.

Keywords: concurrency, async-await, actors, Sendable, typed-throws, Swift-6, migration, data-races, MainActor, nonisolated, isolated, iOS, macOS, SwiftUI, Combine, Swift-concurrency, actor-isolation, strict-concurrency, Swift-migration, modern-Swift, Swift-evolution, code-review, Swift-patterns, Apple-platforms, Xcode, iOS-development, macOS-development

name: systematic-debugging
author: secondsky
description: Four-phase debugging framework that ensures root cause investigation before attempting fixes. Never jump to solutions. Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes.

name: tailwind-v4-shadcn
author: secondsky
description:
Production-tested setup for Tailwind CSS v4 with shadcn/ui, Vite, and React.

Use when: initializing React projects with Tailwind v4, setting up shadcn/ui,
implementing dark mode, debugging CSS variable issues, fixing theme switching,
migrating from Tailwind v3, or encountering color/theming problems.

Covers: @theme inline pattern, CSS variable architecture, dark mode with
ThemeProvider, component composition, vite.config setup, common v4 gotchas,
and production-tested patterns.

Keywords: Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui, @tailwindcss/vite, @theme inline, dark mode,
CSS variables, hsl() wrapper, components.json, React theming, theme switching,
colors not working, variables broken, theme not applying, @plugin directive,
typography plugin, forms plugin, prose class, @tailwindcss/typography,
@tailwindcss/forms
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个经过生产环境测试的配置方案，用于初始化集成了 Tailwind CSS v4 和 shadcn/ui 的 React 项目，涵盖架构、暗色模式、常见陷阱以及主题问题修复，确保快速且无错误的实现。
_original_description: This skill provides a production-tested setup for initializing React projects with Tailwind CSS v4 and shadcn/ui, covering architecture, dark mode, common gotchas, and fixes for theming issues to ensure a fast, error-free implementation.

name: frontend-accessibility-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: Accessibility (a11y) best practices for React components. Use when creating UI components, forms, interactive elements, or reviewing code for accessibility compliance.

name: frontend-async-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: Async/await and Promise optimization guidelines. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring asynchronous code to eliminate waterfalls and maximize parallelism. Triggers on tasks involving data fetching, loaders, actions, or Promise handling.

name: frontend-internationalization-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: Internationalization best practices for React Router framework mode using remix-i18next. Use when setting up locales, middleware, resource routes, or language switching.

name: frontend-js-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: JavaScript performance optimization guidelines. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring JavaScript/TypeScript code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving loops, data structures, DOM manipulation, or general JS optimization.

name: frontend-react-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: React performance optimization guidelines. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React components to ensure optimal rendering and bundle patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, hooks, memoization, or bundle optimization.

name: frontend-react-router-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: React Router performance and architecture patterns. Use when writing loaders, actions, forms, routes, or working with React Router data fetching. Triggers on tasks involving React Router routes, data loading, form handling, or route organization.

name: frontend-tailwind-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: Tailwind CSS patterns and conventions for frontend apps. Use when writing component styles, layouts, or working with CSS classes.

name: frontend-testing-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: Testing best practices for the frontend. Emphasizes E2E tests over unit tests, minimal mocking, and testing behavior over implementation details. Use when writing tests or reviewing test code.

name: owasp-security-check
author: sergiodxa
description: Security audit guidelines for web applications and REST APIs based on OWASP Top 10 and web security best practices. Use when checking code for vulnerabilities, reviewing auth/authz, auditing APIs, or before production deployment.

name: ruby-on-rails-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: Ruby on Rails architecture and coding patterns from Basecamp. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Rails code to follow proven conventions for models, controllers, jobs, and concerns. Triggers on tasks involving Rails models, concerns, controllers, background jobs, or Turbo/Hotwire.

name: skill-writing-best-practices
author: sergiodxa
description: Guidelines for creating AI agent skills. Use when writing new skills, documenting coding patterns, or reviewing skill files. Triggers when creating or modifying files in the skills/ directory.

name: codebase-analyzer
author: severity1
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "initialize auto-memory", "create CLAUDE.md", "set up project memory", or runs the /auto-memory:init command. Analyzes codebase structure and generates CLAUDE.md files using the exact template format with AUTO-MANAGED markers.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的技能，用于自动分析代码库并生成标准化的CLAUDE.md文档，具有清晰的模板、交互式用户确认和框架检测功能。
_original_description: A well-structured skill for automatically analyzing codebases and generating standardized CLAUDE.md documentation with clear templates, interactive user confirmation, and framework detection.

name: memory-processor
author: severity1
description: Process file changes and update CLAUDE.md memory sections. Use when the memory-updater agent needs to analyze dirty files, update AUTO-MANAGED sections, verify content removal, or detect stale commands. Invoked after file edits to keep project memory in sync.
description_zh: 一款用于自动同步CLAUDE.md文档与代码变更的复杂工具，具备智能模式检测和验证机制。
_original_description: A sophisticated tool for automatically synchronizing CLAUDE.md documentation with code changes, featuring intelligent pattern detection and verification mechanisms.

name: dbt-architecture
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: dbt project structure using medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold layers). Use this skill when planning project organization, establishing folder structure, defining naming conventions, implementing layer-based configuration, or ensuring proper model dependencies and architectural patterns.
description_zh: 该技能将Claude转变为专注于实现奖章架构模式的dbt架构顾问。它提供具体的文件夹结构、命名规范、配置策略和决策树来组织dbt项目。指导内容包括特定SQL模板、分层规则以及青铜/白银/黄金层的实际示例。
_original_description: This skill transforms Claude into a dbt architecture consultant focused on implementing medallion architecture patterns. It provides concrete folder structures, naming conventions, configuration strategies, and decision trees for organizing dbt projects. The guidance includes specific SQL templates, layer-specific rules, and practical examples for bronze/silver/gold layers.

name: dbt-artifacts
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Monitor dbt execution using the dbt Artifacts package. Use this skill when you need to track test and model execution history, analyze run patterns over time, monitor data quality metrics, or enable programmatic access to dbt execution metadata across any dbt version or platform.
description_zh: 该技能为AI代理提供使用dbt_artifacts包监控dbt执行的详细指导，包含具体的SQL查询、安装步骤和最佳实践，用于跟踪测试失败、模型性能和数据质量指标。

name: dbt-commands
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: dbt command-line operations, model selection syntax, Jinja patterns, troubleshooting, and debugging. Use this skill when running dbt commands, selecting specific models, debugging compilation errors, using Jinja macros, or troubleshooting dbt execution issues.
description_zh: 提供详细的dbt命令行操作指南、模型选择语法和调试流程。涵盖build、run、test、compile等核心命令，包含依赖选择、标签筛选的实用示例，以及数据转换管道中常见错误的故障排除方法。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance on dbt command-line operations, model selection syntax, and debugging workflows. Covers essential commands like build, run, test, compile with practical examples for dependency selection, tagging, and troubleshooting common errors in data transformation pipelines.

name: dbt-core
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Managing dbt-core locally - installation, configuration, project setup, package management, troubleshooting, and development workflow. Use this skill for all aspects of local dbt-core development including non-interactive scripts for environment setup with conda or venv, and comprehensive configuration templates for profiles.yml and dbt_project.yml.
description_zh: 该技能提供用于本地设置dbt-core与Snowflake的自动化脚本和模板。包含环境诊断、安装选项、配置示例和故障排除指南。工作流程引导AI代理完成用户选择驱动的设置过程。
_original_description: This skill provides automated scripts and templates for setting up dbt-core with Snowflake locally. It includes environment diagnostics, installation options, configuration samples, and troubleshooting guides. The workflow guides AI agents through user-choice-driven setup processes.

name: dbt-materializations
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Choosing and implementing dbt materializations (ephemeral, view, table, incremental, snapshots, Python models). Use this skill when deciding on materialization strategy, implementing incremental models, setting up snapshots for SCD Type 2 tracking, or creating Python models for machine learning workloads.
description_zh: 该技能详细指导如何选择和实施dbt物化策略。涵盖临时表、视图、表、增量模型、快照和Python模型，提供具体示例、决策矩阵和实施建议，适合使用dbt的数据工程师。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance on selecting and implementing dbt materialization strategies. It covers ephemeral, view, table, incremental, snapshot, and Python models with concrete examples, decision matrices, and practical implementation advice for data engineers working with dbt.

name: dbt-modeling
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Writing dbt models with proper CTE patterns, SQL structure, and layer-specific templates. Use this skill when writing or refactoring dbt models, implementing CTE patterns, creating staging/intermediate/mart models, or ensuring proper SQL structure and dependencies.
description_zh: 提供跨青铜、白银、黄金层的dbt模型结构化模板和模式。包含CTE模式、分层规则和物化指导，配有常见数据建模场景的具体SQL示例。
_original_description: Provides structured templates and patterns for writing dbt models across bronze, silver, and gold layers. Includes CTE patterns, staging rules, and materialization guidance with concrete SQL examples for common data modeling scenarios.

name: dbt-performance
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Optimizing dbt and Snowflake performance through materialization choices, clustering keys, warehouse sizing, and query optimization. Use this skill when addressing slow model builds, optimizing query performance, sizing warehouses, implementing clustering strategies, or troubleshooting performance issues.
description_zh: 提供针对Snowflake上dbt模型的性能优化指导，涵盖物化策略选择、集群键设置、仓库大小调整和SQL模式优化。包含具体代码示例解决常见性能瓶颈和排查步骤。
_original_description: Provides concrete guidance for optimizing dbt models on Snowflake, covering materialization choices, clustering keys, warehouse sizing, and SQL patterns. Includes specific code examples for common performance bottlenecks and troubleshooting steps.

name: dbt-projects-on-snowflake
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Deploying, managing, executing, and monitoring dbt projects natively within Snowflake using dbt PROJECT objects and event tables. Use this skill when you want to set up dbt development workspaces, deploy projects to Snowflake, schedule automated runs, monitor execution with event tables, or enable team collaboration directly in Snowflake.
description_zh: 该技能提供在Snowflake内部部署和监控dbt项目的SQL脚本与指南。它利用Snowflake原生的DBT PROJECT对象和事件表来跟踪执行、分析错误和查看性能指标。包含的参数化SQL脚本可查询OpenTelemetry事件日志，实现对dbt运行的监控。
_original_description: This skill provides SQL scripts and guidance for deploying and monitoring dbt projects directly within Snowflake. It focuses on using Snowflake's native DBT PROJECT objects and event tables for execution tracking, error analysis, and performance metrics. The included parameterized SQL scripts query OpenTelemetry event logs to give visibility into dbt runs.

name: dbt-projects-snowflake-setup
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Step-by-step setup guide for dbt Projects on Snowflake including prerequisites, external access integration, Git API integration, event table configuration, and automated scheduling. Use this skill when setting up dbt Projects on Snowflake for the first time or troubleshooting setup issues.
description_zh: 提供在Snowflake上配置dbt项目的完整步骤指南，包括前置条件、外部访问设置、Git集成、工作区创建和监控配置。包含针对网络连接和认证失败等常见问题的故障排除部分。
_original_description: Provides step-by-step instructions for configuring dbt Projects on Snowflake, covering prerequisites, external access setup, Git integration, workspace creation, and monitoring. Includes troubleshooting sections for common issues like network connectivity and authentication failures.

name: dbt-testing
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: dbt testing strategies using dbt_constraints for database-level enforcement, generic tests, and singular tests. Use this skill when implementing data quality checks, adding primary/foreign key constraints, creating custom tests, or establishing comprehensive testing frameworks across bronze/silver/gold layers.
description_zh: 该技能教授如何使用dbt_constraints包实现具有数据库级约束的dbt测试策略。提供主键、外键和唯一约束的具体YAML示例，以及测试严重性、失败存储和针对青铜/白银/黄金数据模型的分层测试方法指导。
_original_description: This skill teaches how to implement dbt testing strategies with database-level constraints using the dbt_constraints package. It provides specific YAML examples for primary keys, foreign keys, and unique constraints, plus guidance on test severity, failure storage, and layer-based testing approaches for bronze/silver/gold data models.

name: doc-scraper
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Generic web scraper for extracting and organizing Snowflake documentation with intelligent caching and configurable spider depth. Scrapes any section of docs.snowflake.com controlled by --base-path.
description_zh: 专用于Snowflake文档的网页爬虫，将HTML页面转换为Markdown格式并采用SQLite缓存。支持可配置的爬取深度和基础路径，通过uv自动安装依赖，生成带Frontmatter的文档结构。适合创建本地文档副本。
_original_description: A specialized web scraper for Snowflake documentation that converts HTML pages to Markdown with SQLite caching. It allows configurable spider depth and base path targeting, auto-installs dependencies via uv, and generates organized output with frontmatter. Useful for creating local documentation copies.

name: playwright-mcp
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Browser testing, web scraping, and UI validation using Playwright MCP. Use this skill when you need to test Streamlit apps, validate web interfaces, test responsive design, check accessibility, or automate browser interactions through MCP tools.
description_zh: 该技能通过Playwright提供浏览器自动化的MCP工具，支持网页应用测试、数据抓取和界面验证。包含导航、交互和验证工具，提供表单测试、响应式设计检查和可访问性验证的明确流程。文档包含故障排除指南和具体测试模式。
_original_description: This skill provides MCP tools for browser automation using Playwright, enabling testing of web apps, scraping, and UI validation. It includes navigation, interaction, and validation tools with clear workflows for form testing, responsive design checks, and accessibility validation. The documentation offers troubleshooting guidance and specific testing patterns.

name: schemachange
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Deploying and managing Snowflake database objects using version control with schemachange. Use this skill when you need to manage database migrations for objects not handled by dbt, implement CI/CD pipelines for schema changes, or coordinate deployments across multiple environments.
description_zh: 该技能使用版本控制的迁移脚本来管理Snowflake数据库模式变更。支持三种脚本类型：版本化脚本用于一次性变更，可重复脚本用于可重建对象，始终运行脚本用于幂等的部署任务。工具可与CI/CD流水线集成并提供清晰的执行顺序。
_original_description: This skill manages Snowflake database schema changes using version-controlled migration scripts. It supports three script types: versioned for one-time changes, repeatable for recreatable objects, and always for idempotent deployment tasks. The tool integrates with CI/CD pipelines and provides clear execution ordering.

name: skills-sync
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Manage and synchronize AI agent skills from local SKILL.md files and remote Git repositories, generating Cursor rules with Agent Skills specification XML. This skill should be used when users need to sync skills, add/remove skill repositories, or set up the skills infrastructure.
description_zh: 该工具通过同步本地SKILL.md文件和远程Git仓库来管理AI代理技能，生成包含XML规范的Cursor规则。它处理多个技能位置并遵循优先级规则，自动安装依赖，并为IDE集成创建.cursor/rules/skills.mdc文件。
_original_description: This tool manages AI agent skills by syncing local SKILL.md files and remote Git repositories, generating Cursor rules with XML specification. It handles multiple skill locations with precedence rules, auto-installs dependencies, and creates .cursor/rules/skills.mdc for IDE integration.

name: snowflake-cli
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Executing SQL, managing Snowflake objects, deploying applications, and orchestrating data pipelines using the Snowflake CLI (snow) command. Use this skill when you need to run SQL scripts, deploy Streamlit apps, execute Snowpark procedures, manage stages, automate Snowflake operations from CI/CD pipelines, or work with variables and templating.
description_zh: 该技能使Claude能够执行Snowflake CLI命令，用于SQL操作、阶段管理和应用部署。涵盖三种变量模板语法、连接配置和多环境模式。文档包含常见问题（如变量替换、权限错误）的故障排除指南。
_original_description: This skill enables Claude to execute Snowflake CLI commands for SQL operations, stage management, and application deployment. It covers variable templating with three syntax types, connection profiles, and multi-environment patterns. The documentation includes troubleshooting guides for common issues like variable substitution and permission errors.

name: snowflake-connections
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Configuring Snowflake connections using connections.toml (for Snowflake CLI, Streamlit, Snowpark) or profiles.yml (for dbt) with multiple authentication methods (SSO, key pair, username/password, OAuth), managing multiple environments, and overriding settings with environment variables. Use this skill when setting up Snowflake CLI, Streamlit apps, dbt, or any tool requiring Snowflake authentication and connection management.
description_zh: 该技能详细指导如何为Snowflake CLI、Streamlit应用和Snowpark项目配置连接。涵盖多种认证方法、多环境管理和CI/CD集成，提供具体文件示例和安全实践。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for configuring Snowflake connections across CLI tools, Streamlit apps, and Snowpark applications. It covers multiple authentication methods (SSO, key pair, username/password, OAuth), environment management, and CI/CD integration with specific file examples and security best practices.

name: streamlit-development
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Developing, testing, and deploying Streamlit data applications on Snowflake. Use this skill when you're building interactive data apps, setting up local development environments, testing with pytest or Playwright, or deploying apps to Snowflake using Streamlit in Snowflake.
description_zh: 该技能提供在本地和Snowflake上运行Streamlit数据应用的具体模式。涵盖会话管理、使用pytest/Playwright测试、部署命令以及Snowflake特定限制（如不支持的UI组件）。包含数据分离、缓存和错误处理的代码示例。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns for building Streamlit apps that run both locally and on Snowflake. It covers session management, testing with pytest/Playwright, deployment commands, and Snowflake-specific limitations like unsupported UI components. Includes code examples for data separation, caching, and error handling.

name: task-master
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: AI-powered task management for structured, specification-driven development. Use this skill when you need to manage complex projects with PRDs, break down tasks into subtasks, track dependencies, and maintain organized development workflows across features and branches.
description_zh: Task Master 是一个 AI 驱动的任务管理系统，可将产品需求文档解析为结构化任务，分解为子任务并跟踪依赖关系。支持为不同功能或分支创建标签化上下文，集成 AI 进行复杂度分析和研究，并提供 CLI 和 MCP 接口用于开发工作流。
_original_description: Task Master is an AI-powered task management system that parses PRDs into structured tasks, breaks them into subtasks, and tracks dependencies. It supports tagged contexts for different features or branches, integrates with AI for complexity analysis and research, and offers both CLI and MCP interfaces for development workflows.

name: task-master-install
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Install and initialize task-master for AI-powered task management and specification-driven development. Use this skill when users ask you to parse a new PRD, when starting a new project that needs structured task management, when users mention wanting task breakdown or project planning, or when implementing specification-driven development workflows.
description_zh: 安装task-master工具，用于AI辅助的项目任务分解和规范驱动开发。提供清晰的安装步骤、MCP服务器配置以及常见Node.js问题的故障排除指南。
_original_description: Installs task-master for AI-assisted project breakdown and specification-driven development. Provides clear installation steps, MCP server setup for AI agents, and troubleshooting guidance for common Node.js issues.

name: task-master-viewer
author: sfc-gh-dflippo
description: Launch a Streamlit GUI for Task Master tasks.json editing. Use when users want a visual interface instead of CLI/MCP commands.
description_zh: 为Task Master的tasks.json文件提供基于Streamlit的图形界面编辑器，作为CLI命令的替代方案。包含清晰的启动说明、故障排除提示，并与现有工具集成。
_original_description: Provides a Streamlit-based GUI for editing Task Master tasks.json files, offering visual task management as an alternative to CLI commands. Includes clear launch instructions, troubleshooting tips, and integration guidance with existing tools.

name: api-testing
author: sgcarstrends
description: Write and run API tests with Vitest for endpoints, middleware, and integrations. Use when testing API functionality, request/response validation, or error handling.
description_zh: 该技能使用 Vitest 为基于 Hono 的 API 服务提供全面的测试能力，涵盖端点、中间件、数据库集成和错误处理，以确保 API 功能的健壮性。
_original_description: This skill enables comprehensive API testing using Vitest for Hono-based services, covering endpoints, middleware, database integrations, and error handling to ensure robust API functionality.

name: cache-components
author: sgcarstrends
description: Ensure 'use cache' is used strategically to minimize CPU usage and ISR writes. Use when creating/modifying queries to verify caching decisions align with data update patterns and cost optimization.
description_zh: 该技能实现Next.js 16缓存组件，通过添加'use cache'指令、配置缓存生命周期、设置Suspense边界和使用领域级缓存标签来优化页面性能并实现高效缓存失效。
_original_description: This skill implements Next.js 16 Cache Components to optimize page performance by adding 'use cache' directives, configuring cacheLife profiles, setting up Suspense boundaries, and using domain-level cache tags for efficient invalidation.
